Email Your Massachusetts State Senator

1. Find Your Senator's Contact Info
Go to the Find My Legislator page and enter your address. Click the Senator tab for your senator's name, email, and phone number. (You can also use the Representative tab for your state rep.)
2. Write Your Email
You can copy and paste the sample email below, or customize it to add your own voice. Feel free to thank your senator for sponsoring bills you support, or ask them to sponsor new ones—check the Progressive Mass Scorecard for ideas.
Sample Email to Your Senator

Subject: Please Pass the Protect Act

Hi Senator [Last Name],

I just found out that the Protect Act passed the House of Representatives. I hope you and your colleagues will pass the Protect Act in the Senate without any amendments that would weaken it. This is really important to me, and I’m looking forward to seeing it enacted.

Thank you for your work!

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Your Town]

  • Replace [Last Name], [Your Name], and [Your Town] with your info.
  • Want to personalize? Mention a specific reason you care, or thank them for supporting other bills.
Tip: You can also call your senator using the phone number listed on their profile page.
Note: The "Find My Legislator" tool is the fastest way to get up-to-date contact information for both your senator and representative.
